stories.title: Follow live: Bellingham restores England's lead in...
Ronaldo, Portugal frustrated in Congo DR draw
stories.summary: Congo DR produced another stunning result at the 2026 World Cup, as the African side held one of the pre-tournament favorites, Portugal, to a 1-1 draw in Houston on Wednesday.

stories.title: Burrow: Bengals have same vibes as LSU title team
stories.summary: Joe Burrow said the vibes on this year's Bengals' team are similar to what they were on the 2019 LSU team he led to a College Football Playoff championship.

stories.title: Leaders face big questions over 24-team CFP
stories.summary: CFP leaders took a deeper dive into conversations about a 24-team field at a meeting Wednesday, but there are still more questions than answers about the logistics of what the field would look like if it began in 2027.

stories.title: Golf bodies set 2030 target date for ball rollback...
stories.summary: The proposed golf ball rollback spearheaded by the United States Golf Association and R&A will now take place as a single-date implementation in January 2030.
